lineager 0.1.0
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Exclusion tracking and subject tracing
    • Getting started with lineager
    • Populations, variable specifications, and reporting
  • Changelog

Reference

All functions

lg_derive()

Derive new variables with documented derivation

lg_disposition()

Generate a subject disposition summary

lg_end()

End a lineager provenance session

lg_exclusions()

Retrieve the exclusion registry

lg_filter()

Filter a tagged dataset with mandatory exclusion documentation

lg_join()

Join two tagged datasets with lineage tracking

lg_lineage()

Build a pipeline lineage graph from the active session

lg_operations()

Retrieve the operation log as a data frame

lg_plot()

Render a lineage graph

lg_population()

Document and apply a population flag

lg_report()

Generate a CDISC Reviewer's Guide-aligned provenance report

lg_spec()

Document an SDTM-to-ADaM variable derivation

lg_start()

Start a lineager provenance session

lg_tag()

Tag a dataset to begin lineage tracking

lg_trace()

Trace a subject's complete lineage journey

lineager lineager-package

lineager: Row-Level Data Provenance and Exclusion Tracking
